records.ety: [AS. broð; akin to OHG. brod, brot; cf. Ir. broth, Gael. brot. √93. Cf. Brewis, Brew.]

defs: Liquid in which flesh (and sometimes other substances, as barley or rice) has been boiled; thin or simple soup.
quotes: I am sure by your unprejudiced discourses that you love broth better than soup.
